title: pulegium vulgare
intro: Pulegium vulgare, also known as pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to Europe and is a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a carminative, reducing gas and bloating, and as an antispasmodic, relieving muscle cramps and spasms. The health benefits of pennyroyal include its potential to aid in digestion, alleviate menstrual cramps, and repel insects. Pennyroyal can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
